chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "عَجِبْتُ لِمَنْ يَحْتَمِي مِنَ اَلطَّعَامِ مَخَافَةَ اَلدَّاءِ كَيْفَ لاَ يَحْتَمِي مِنَ اَلذُّنُوبِ مَخَافَةَ اَلنَّارِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4272 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"I am amazed at the one who abstains from food out of fear of illness, how does he not abstain from sins out of fear of the Fire?"
